Grid Access Strategy

Navigating Grid Access Risks.

Across BESS, renewables, and data centres, timelines are slipping. Grid access has become one of the largest investment risks. Revolt was built to improve what is within your control.

VIEW GRIDSCORE BOOK A CALL

Grid Pressure

Speed to grid is more critical than ever

As energy demand accelerates, the primary bottleneck has shifted from capital to grid capacity. Project viability now depends on the ability to secure and optimize connection points before competitors do.

Grid constraints are no longer just a technical hurdle. They define market risk across BESS, renewable energy projects, and data centres. Revolt provides the strategic clarity needed to navigate complex regulatory processes and technical limitations earlier.

400+

Grid scenarios mapped

15ms

Decision latency

Gridscore Platform

Gridscore turns grid constraints into actionable site intelligence

Gridscore ranks connection opportunities, capacity signals, and regulatory constraints so teams can prioritize viable BESS, renewable, and data centre projects before committing capital.

  • Connection Risk Ranking

    Compare candidate sites by grid access risk, capacity pressure, and connection pathway.

  • Shared Pipeline View

    Align development, investment, and technical teams around the same grid-score logic.

  • Faster Screening

    Shorten early-stage qualification by focusing diligence on the strongest grid positions.

Ready to find your strongest grid position?

Use Gridscore to compare connection risk, capacity signals, and project viability before capital is committed.
